records.ety: [Gr. <?/; <?/ God + <?/ to be strong, to rule, fr. <?/ strength: cf. F. thocratie. See Theism, and cf. Democracy.]

defs: Government of a state by the immediate direction or administration of God; hence, the exercise of political authority by priests as representing the Deity.
The state thus governed, as the Hebrew commonwealth before it became a kingdom.
